overall.description: First-person exploration of a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and futuristic architecture. The character crosses a wide intersection and walks along the sidewalk past pedestrians and a building with an outdoor balcony area before reaching an upscale entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with wide crosswalk

events.description: white van passes from right to left across the crosswalk
beginning to cross the wide yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk
orange car and black car drive past while crossing

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection through the rain-soaked crosswalk

notable_agents.action: white van driving past the crosswalk from right to left
pedestrians walking on the opposite side of the street

building facade covered with large digital advertisement screens

tall building with prominent red neon signage reading FUYUTSUKI

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a wide futuristic intersection at night, with heavy rain creating reflections on the wet asphalt. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk while vehicles pass by, flanked by towering glass buildings with neon illumination. The Fuyutsuki tower looms on the left with its distinctive red signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit sidewalk with holographic advertising displays

events.description: finishing crossing and turning left to follow the sidewalk along the street
passing a large red structural pillar that temporarily blocks the right side of view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past illuminated holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large curved digital screen displaying colorful animated advertisements
illuminated corporate signage spanning across the street overhead
horizontal light fixture mounted on tall pole illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera now walks along the concrete sidewalk flanked by massive holographic billboards on the left. The Kendachi corporate sign spans the street ahead, while the Fuyutsuki tower recedes into the background. The rain continues to fall, creating reflective surfaces on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to multi-level building with outdoor social balcony

events.description: approaching a building with people gathered on an outdoor balcony
slight turn to the right while passing the balcony area

agents.ego_description: walking past pedestrians on the sidewalk and approaching the building with the outdoor balcony

notable_agents.action: person with backpack walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
group of people socializing on the outdoor balcony with drinks

entered.detail: elevated outdoor terrace with glass railing and people standing
dark building facade with illuminated D logo signage
tropical palm tree in planter near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian with a backpack and approaching a building featuring an outdoor balcony where people are gathered socializing. The Delamain corporate logo becomes visible on the left wall, and the street takes on a more intimate scale with the balcony overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale building entrance with covered walkway and valet area

events.description: entering the covered entrance area beneath the purple-lit canopy
slowing down while approaching the main entrance doors

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance under the purple-lit overhang, passing the parked courier vehicle

notable_agents.action: black luxury car parked at the entrance with illuminated COURIER SERVICE text

entered.detail: covered entrance with purple neon lighting and waterfall feature overhead
sleek black vehicle with blue illuminated text on the side
illuminated water feature with purple lighting above the entrance
row of red automated kiosks or vending machines

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the Delamain building entrance, moving under a purple-lit canopy that provides shelter from the rain. A black courier car is parked at the entrance with illuminated signage. The camera slows as it reaches the main doors, passing red vending machines on the right and the illuminated corporate logo on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vast, rain-slicked futuristic intersection toward the sheltered entrance of an upscale corporate building. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst heavy rain and towering neon glass buildings, with the red signage of the Fuyutsuki tower looming overhead. As the camera moves onto the concrete sidewalk, the scale shifts from the open intersection to a corridor of massive holographic billboards and the spanning Kendachi corporate sign. The scene then becomes more intimate as the camera passes a pedestrian and moves beneath an outdoor balcony where people are socializing, bringing the Delamain corporate logo into view. Finally, the movement leads under a purple-lit canopy that shields the camera from the rain, passing red vending machines and a parked black courier car before slowing to a halt at the main entrance doors.
